riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)
new capability: new exported class / subsystem added

causalAutopsy.notes: The Subscription & Auth Standard's continuity guarantee promised a PRE-LIMIT swap, but only the REACTIVE half shipped (autoSwapOnRateLimit, fires after the wall) — the proactive trigger was designed-but-never-wired (QuotaAwareScheduler.accountAtPressure existed but was never called). The gap sat latent until a live session wedged at a quota wall on 2026-06-09 (the untagged interactive session on the default login, which the reactive swap couldn't even find), forcing a manual account swap. This change wires the missing proactive trigger + makes untagged default-login sessions swap-visible.
